description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy resembling a cartoonish saber-toothed tiger with exaggerated features. Its body is predominantly blue with a yellow mane and face, accented by white tusks and paws, and a red base and tail tip. The toy has embroidered facial details, including a closed eye with a black outline and a whimsical, slightly mischievous expression. The mane is textured and extends down the back of the head, while the tail is long and slightly curved. The overall shape is rounded and soft, with visible seams and a cuddly appearance. The toy appears lightweight and designed for children, with no hard or detachable parts.
description: A plush, cartoon-style saber-toothed tiger stuffed toy with blue body, yellow mane, white tusks, and red accents. It has a soft, rounded form and embroidered facial features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the toy's face, white tusks, yellow mane, and blue body with red feet and tail tip.
description_view_1: Rear three-quarter view highlighting the back of the head, mane, and the length of the blue tail with a red tip.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the profile of the face, closed eye, and the full length of the tail.
description_view_3: Front three-quarter view showing the face, tusks, and the toy's overall rounded shape.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is whimsical and slightly mischievous, with a closed embroidered eye, a curved eyebrow, and a small stitched mouth. The features give the toy a playful and friendly appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with front legs extended forward and the tail curving to the side. The head is slightly tilted, giving a lively and engaging posture.
